title: mentha chaunanthera
intro: Mentha chaunanthera, also known as Chanderi or Indian pennyroyal, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to act as an antispasmodic, carminative, and antiseptic, making it effective in relieving digestive issues and reducing inflammation. The health benefits of Mentha chaunanthera include its potential to alleviate menstrual cramps, reduce fever, and aid in digestion, making it a valuable herb in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of Mentha chaunanthera include teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used to reap its medicinal benefits.
